name: palo-governance-server
description: Programmatic Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for PALO Agentic Interface (PALO-AI) execution, compliance, and evidence tracking.

tools.name: palo_register_agent
tools.description: Register an agent's Identity and Authority Limits inside the local PALO Case File.

role.description: The role name of the agent (e.g. Lead, Subagent, Auditor).

systemPromptHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the system instructions.

tools.name: palo_verify_action_authority
tools.description: Intercept and check if a proposed agent tool execution complies with PALO authority matrix and policy boundaries.

proposedTool.description: The tool name that the agent proposes to execute.

arguments.description: Parameters for the proposed tool call.

tools.name: palo_submit_evidence
tools.description: Submit a signed evidence artifact (execution log, audit trail entry) to the active PALO Case File.

kind.description: The evidence type (e.g. test, note, canvas, sign-log).

content.description: Detailed log or payload to store.

signature.description: Cryptographic signature generated by the agent's private key.
